title: Sanji Returns to Luffy
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Luffy, Capone Bege, Jinbe, Nami, Sanji, Big Mom as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you serious...?! This tea party is just steeped with conspiracy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I have been in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As for pekoms, who guided you all here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth is, he was taken by Bege and his cohorts... and was offered to become an accomplice with their schemes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: pekoms ...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So that's where he went!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But pekoms, who has a strong sense of duty, refused the offer....!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And in order to ensure that he kept quiet, he was shot, and dropped into the seas for the sharks to feed on him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Huuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However... luckily for him, he was found by one of my comrades, and saved by a hair's breadth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And he's currently recuperating.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So he's safe then! I'm glad to hear it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I've had it up to here with this bege bastard! I'll never forgive him! :^

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy. From here on out is the meat of the conversation. I've heard everything about this plan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: from pekoms himself. And I've done quite a bit of thinking on how you all should act from here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once you heard this whole story, I knew that you would want to rescue Sanji and his entire family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I certainly feel bad for pekoms, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is now really the time to make an enemy of Bege?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the tea party will begin at 10 a.m. that's only about five hours away...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unlike the ten of us, who, starting now, are trying to make up a plan from scratch...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told you to not include us in your little schemes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You fiends! I'll expose all of this, just you wait!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: bege and his crew have meticu- Lously made preparations for this day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hmmm-?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sanji! Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Would you join forces with Bege?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What AAA at??!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...you might be onto something there!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Whoa! Luffy, are you insane?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy, you haven't actually been taken in by jinbe... Have you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: See? What did I tell ya?! Just what I thought he'd say!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy! We voted against it, 4-2!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've actually already made the preparations for a meeting. Should we go see him?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Alright! Let's meet with him right away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Huuuuuuuuuuuuuuuh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: calm down! if we don't like the sound of it, we can just turn him down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Our objectives are slightly different, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: NorthWest Whole Cake Island: Fire Tank Pirates Hideout

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So did you off Bobbin?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...indeed I did. He was chasing after black leg, and...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, the German are my heroes, after all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: NYO- RORO!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do your really think those guys are comin', father?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Jinbe isn't a man who'd joke around about something like this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's only logical that neither of us would want to make ourselves more enemies, given that we're both planning on opposing big mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rest all depends on straw hat's attitude...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he does anything to piss me off,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Gang" is gonna give Luffy an offer he can't refuse..."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All we gotta do is take 'im out right here!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
